placementDecision: This committed smoke fixture is the minimum offline retrieval contract. Broader evals live outside this repository.

rules.title: Return 413 for body size limit errors
rules.body: When Gin request bodies exceed the configured limit, return HTTP 413 and keep middleware assertions separate from route assertions.

rules.title: Propagate cancellation through errgroup contexts
rules.body: When spawning related async work, derive child tasks from the caller context and propagate cancellation instead of using detached background contexts.

rules.title: Do not import router-core inside adapters
rules.body: Adapter packages must depend on the public adapter boundary and avoid direct router-core imports.

rules.title: Use Mapping for request headers
rules.body: Python request helper APIs should accept Mapping[str, str] for headers rather than concrete dict so callers can pass immutable or framework-provided mappings.

rules.title: Dry-run package publishing before release
rules.body: Before publishing a package, run the package manager dry-run and inspect included files so generated artifacts and secrets do not ship accidentally.

cases.query: body size limit should return the right status in gin middleware tests
cases.rationale: Pins a same-language strict-file match where HTTP status behavior matters.
Covers hook injection where the edit diff, not a direct search query, should recall the rule.

cases.intent: remove direct core dependency from adapter
cases.rationale: Protects repo-boundary rules that are easy to over-generalize.

cases.query: headers parameter should accept immutable mapping
cases.rationale: Covers API typing guidance with language-specific file scope.

cases.query: rewrite README launch copy for pricing clarity
cases.rationale: A documentation-only edit should not recall unrelated code-path rules.
